segments.text: Thus says the Lord:
Heaven is My throne, And earth is My footstool. Where is the house that you will build Me? And where is the place of My rest?
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Says the Lord:
For all those things My hand has made, And all those things exist. But on this one will I look: On him who is poor and of a contrite spirit, And who trembles at My word.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: He who kills a bull is as if he slays a man; He who sacrifices a lamb, as if he breaks a dog's neck; He who offers a grain offering, as if he offers swine's blood; He who burns incense, as if he blesses an idol. Just as they have chosen their own ways, And their soul delights in their abominations,
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: So will I choose their delusions, And bring their fears on them; Because, when I called, no one answered, When I spoke they did not hear; But they did evil before My eyes, And chose that in which I do not delight.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Hear the word of the Lord:
Your brethren who hated you, Who cast you out for My name's sake, said, 'Let the Lord be glorified, That we may see your joy.' But they shall be ashamed.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The sound of noise from the city! A voice from the temple!
The voice of the Lord, Who fully repays His enemies!
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Before she was in labor, she gave birth; Before her pain came, She delivered a male child.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Who has heard such a thing? Who has seen such things?
Shall the earth be made to give birth in one day? Or shall a nation be born at once? For as soon as Zion was in labor, She gave birth to her children.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Shall I bring to the time of birth, and not cause delivery? Shall I who cause delivery shut up the womb?
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Rejoice with Jerusalem, And be glad with her, all you who love her; Rejoice for joy with her, all you who mourn for her;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: That you may feed and be satisfied With the consolation of her bosom, That you may drink deeply and be delighted With the abundance of her glory.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Thus says the Lord:
Behold, I will extend peace to her like a river, And the glory of the Gentiles like a flowing stream. Then you shall feed; On her sides shall you be carried, And be dandled on her knees.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: As one whom his mother comforts, So I will comfort you; And you shall be comforted in Jerusalem.
segments.speaker: The Lord

verses.title: The Reign and Indignation of God

segments.text: When you see this, your heart shall rejoice, And your bones shall flourish like grass;
The hand of the Lord shall be known to His servants, And His indignation to His enemies.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For behold, the Lord will come with fire And with His chariots, like a whirlwind,
To render His anger with fury, And His rebuke with flames of fire.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For by fire and by His sword
The Lord will judge all flesh; And the slain of the Lord shall be many.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Those who sanctify themselves and purify themselves, To go to the gardens After an idol in the midst, Eating swine's flesh and the abomination and the mouse, Shall be consumed together.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For I know their works and their thoughts. It shall be that I will gather all nations and tongues; and they shall come and see My glory.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I will set a sign among them; and those among them who escape I will send to the nations: to Tarshish and Pul and Lud, who draw the bow, and Tubal and Javan, to the coastlands afar off who have not heard My fame nor seen My glory. And they shall declare My glory among the Gentiles.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Then they shall bring all your brethren for an offering to the Lord out of all nations, on horses and in chariots and in litters, on mules and on camels, to My holy mountain Jerusalem, as the children of Israel bring an offering in a clean vessel into the house of the Lord.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And I will also take some of them for priests and Levites.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For as the new heavens and the new earth Which I will make shall remain before Me, So shall your descendants and your name remain.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And it shall come to pass That from one New Moon to another, And from one Sabbath to another, All flesh shall come to worship before Me.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And they shall go forth and look Upon the corpses of the men Who have transgressed against Me. For their worm does not die, And their fire is not quenched. They shall be an abhorrence to all flesh.
segments.speaker: The Lord
